LanguageData.XEA_HBlade.label: Blade Hood
LanguageData.XEA_HBlade.description: The design is origin from a lost civilization's assassin cluture, which the archaeologist can only found the disk they left behind. According to the data, some of those assassin are very "high profile", even assassination was done in the bright day light. Because it's style is quite favorable to the XEO, they decided to let the hat to shine again. However, once a weapone designer warned that: This hat will limited the wearer's sight and pose them under the threat of a bullet going through their head.
LanguageData.XEA_Blade.label: Blade Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Blade.description: Equiped with Kinetic energy transfer field, as long as its transfer rate still in the positive, you can dance in the rain of bullet as you wish, forcing the enemise to melee with you. However, this this isn't invincible, many assassins got some extra holes in their body because they were too high on the battlefield. As for the basic defense aspect of this armor... let's us enjoy the perfect body of the wearer, shall we?
LanguageData.XEA_HBladeM.label: Blade Hood MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HBladeM.description: The design is origin from a lost civilization's assassin cluture, which the archaeologist can only found the disk they left behind. According to the data, some of those assassin are very "high profile", even assassination was done in the bright day light. Because it's style is quite favorable to the XEO, they decided to let the hat to shine again. However, once a weapone designer warned that: This hat will limited the wearer's sight and pose them under the threat of a bullet going through their head.
LanguageData.XEA_BladeM.label: Blade Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_BladeM.description: Equiped with Kinetic energy transfer field, as long as its transfer rate still in the positive, you can dance in the rain of bullet as you wish, forcing the enemise to melee with you. However, this this isn't invincible, many assassins got some extra holes in their body because they were too high on the battlefield. As for the basic defense aspect of this armor... let's us enjoy the perfect body of the wearer, shall we?
LanguageData.XEA_HMaster.label: Master Hood
LanguageData.XEA_HMaster.description: Equipment used by XEO master assassin.
LanguageData.XEA_Master.label: Master Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Master.description: Equipment used by XEO master assassin.
LanguageData.XEA_HMasterM.label: Master Hood MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HMasterM.description: Equipment used by XEO master assassin.
LanguageData.XEA_MasterM.label: Master Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_MasterM.description: Equipment used by XEO master assassin.
LanguageData.XEA_HValkyrie.label: Valkyrie Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HValkyrie.description: A heavy helmet used by XEO. Made of black steel, helmet's defensive ability are outstanding in all aspect, however, there was a record of a assassin had their nose bitten off while fighting with a turtle. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Valkyrie.label: Valkyrie Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Valkyrie.description: An armor design to deal with various situation. Made of black steel, it can provide it's wearer a all-around protection. However, please keep in mind that this armor wasn't powered by a external source, but the strenght of it's wearer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HValkyrieM.label: Valkyrie Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HValkyrieM.description: A heavy helmet used by XEO. Made of black steel, helmet's defensive ability are outstanding in all aspect, however, there was a record of a assassin had their nose bitten off while fighting with a turtle. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_ValkyrieM.label: Valkyrie Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_ValkyrieM.description: An armor design to deal with various situation. Made of black steel, it can provide it's wearer a all-around protection. However, please keep in mind that this armor wasn't powered by a external source, but the strenght of it's wearer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Dancer.label: XEO Dancer Dress
LanguageData.XEA_Dancer.description: XEO serves lots of deitied, and the goddess of harvest is one of them. Legends says that she will dance in the field wearing this suit, and inspired by her blessing the farmers will work even more efficient. However, the fact is that there are farming tools included in this suit, dancing is actually means hoeing the ground. Also there are legends says that this suit can actract wild animals, and there were grils taming animals by their song and dance wearing this suit, but the fact might be that those animals was atracted by those beefy thigh.
LanguageData.XEA_HExecutor.label: Executor Mask
LanguageData.XEA_HExecutor.description: Equipment of the StarExplorer Executors. Geared with oxygen supply and temperture control allow the user to travel through some harsh enviornment. But wearing this weird mask as a daily dress, you will definitly regarded as some sort of maniac.
LanguageData.XEA_Executor.label: Executor Suit
LanguageData.XEA_Executor.description: Suit of a StarExplorer Executor. Carboncrystalfiber provid great mobility and well temperture resistance, and the V system included in the suit can also improve the wearer's shootig ability, best suited for the those who suck at shooting.
LanguageData.XEA_HExecutorM.label: Executor Mask MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HExecutorM.description: Equipment of the StarExplorer Executors. Geared with oxygen supply and temperture control allow the user to travel through some harsh enviornment. But wearing this weird mask as a daily dress, you will definitly regarded as some sort of maniac.
LanguageData.XEA_ExecutorM.label: Executor Suit MIL
LanguageData.XEA_ExecutorM.description: Suit of a StarExplorer Executor. Carboncrystalfiber provid great mobility and well temperture resistance, and the V system included in the suit can also improve the wearer's shootig ability, best suited for the those who suck at shooting.
LanguageData.XEA_HBlueStar.label: Blue Star Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HBlueStar.description: A military grade equipment of StarExplorer, suited with direct neural interface, which can control the user's endocrine system to against the psychi attack and increase focus. And its horn aren't merely decoration, many people got their ass destroyed, because they under estimate the horn. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_BlueStar.label: Blue Star Armor
LanguageData.XEA_BlueStar.description: A military grade equipment of StarExplorer. The invasive design and the IceTear engin provid the wearer a perfect temperture control and maintain a zero-waste body circulation, some one who is so lazy they haven't take off their suit for over a year. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HBlueStarM.label: Blue Star Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HBlueStarM.description: A military grade equipment of StarExplorer, suited with direct neural interface, which can control the user's endocrine system to against the psychi attack and increase focus. And its horn aren't merely decoration, many people got their ass destroyed, because they under estimate the horn. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_BlueStarM.label: Blue Star Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_BlueStarM.description: A military grade equipment of StarExplorer. The invasive design and the IceTear engin provid the wearer a perfect temperture control and maintain a zero-waste body circulation, some one who is so lazy they haven't take off their suit for over a year. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HTranscender.label: Transcender Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HTranscender.description: Equipment of the Leader of StarExplorer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Transcender.label: Transcender Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Transcender.description: Equipment of the Leader of StarExplorer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HTranscenderM.label: Transcender Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HTranscenderM.description: Equipment of the Leader of StarExplorer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_TranscenderM.label: Transcender Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_TranscenderM.description: Equipment of the Leader of StarExplorer. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Research.label: SE Database Uniform
LanguageData.XEA_Research.description: The learning AI and machine arms hidden under the cape can enhence the Researcher's speed while crafting and analyzing data. And because the lab is in constant threat of fire due to those crazy scientist, this suit provide some fire resistant ability.
LanguageData.XEA_HFalcon.label: Falcon Battle Glasses
LanguageData.XEA_HFalcon.description: The aiming assist AI can provide data about the environment and target distance, but don't count on this thing to provide any kind of defense. From the data shows that many user's body have lost their thinking part.
LanguageData.XEA_Falcon.label: Falcon Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Falcon.description: Special equipment for the Jaeger sniper. Insulated tights can allow the sniper to stay in hazzardous environment. In order to provide great mobility, this suit's armorplate cover only a little part of the body, but it is said that wearing so sexy can interfere opponent snipers.
LanguageData.XEA_HFalconM.label: Falcon Battle Glasses MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HFalconM.description: The aiming assist AI can provide data about the environment and target distance, but don't count on this thing to provide any kind of defense. From the data shows that many user's body have lost their thinking part.
LanguageData.XEA_FalconM.label: Falcon Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_FalconM.description: Special equipment for the Jaeger sniper. Insulated tights can allow the sniper to stay in hazzardous environment. In order to provide great mobility, this suit's armorplate cover only a little part of the body, but it is said that wearing so sexy can interfere opponent snipers.
LanguageData.XEA_HTimberWolf.label: Timber Wolf Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HTimberWolf.description: Made of jade, it provide the wearer great defense against penetration, and the tatical AI can assist aiming for lead by captureing and analyze the target movement, however, don't trust these AI too much, according to the data, these AI often aiming too way up from the target, where normal enemies won't be at. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_TimberWolf.label: Timber Wolf Armor
LanguageData.XEA_TimberWolf.description: A battlefield specialized power armor, combining exoskeleton and armor made of jadesilver, its elastic alloy, which is able to bear great weight and defence against penetration, can absorb the kinetic energy from the weapone, but the armor increase the effect when the wearer experience blunt damage or impact. Once a person wearing this suit conducting intense exercise and thus pass out due to the excessive shock. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HTimberWolfM.label: Timber Wolf Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HTimberWolfM.description: Made of jade, it provide the wearer great defense against penetration, and the tatical AI can assist aiming for lead by captureing and analyze the target movement, however, don't trust these AI too much, according to the data, these AI often aiming too way up from the target, where normal enemies won't be at. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_TimberWolfM.label: Timber Wolf Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_TimberWolfM.description: A battlefield specialized power armor, combining exoskeleton and armor made of jadesilver, its elastic alloy, which is able to bear great weight and defence against penetration, can absorb the kinetic energy from the weapone, but the armor increase the effect when the wearer experience blunt damage or impact. Once a person wearing this suit conducting intense exercise and thus pass out due to the excessive shock. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HFenrir.label: Fenrir Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HFenrir.description: Equipment for the Jaeger commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Fenrir.label: Fenrir Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Fenrir.description: Equipment for the Jaeger commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HFenrirM.label: Fenrir Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HFenrirM.description: Equipment for the Jaeger commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_FenrirM.label: Fenrir Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_FenrirM.description: Equipment for the Jaeger commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Uniform.label: Peace Messenger
LanguageData.XEA_Uniform.description: "Peace Messenger" is an institution of LOVE. They mediate conflict and helping orphans to find their parents. As long as you wear this uniform, people will also regard you as a person full of LOVE.
LanguageData.XEA_HFireFiend.label: Fire Fiend Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HFireFiend.description: Equipment for the battlefield engineer. From tip to toe all made of hard gold, can resist brick attack well. Suited with SONAR to render buildings, enable the wearer accelerate its construction speed. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_FireFiend.label: Fire Fiend Armor
LanguageData.XEA_FireFiend.description: Equipment for the battlefield engineer. Design in order to enable personnel to fix and construct. Equiped with excavation tools and machine arms, whole armor is made of hard gold, providing great resistance to blunt damage and intense heat. Its leg's mechenical structure were modified to bearing weight, but in the cost of movement speed. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HFireFiendM.label: Fire Fiend Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HFireFiendM.description: Equipment for the battlefield engineer. From tip to toe all made of hard gold, can resist brick attack well. Suited with SONAR to render buildings, enable the wearer accelerate its construction speed. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_FireFiendM.label: Fire Fiend Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_FireFiendM.description: Equipment for the battlefield engineer. Design in order to enable personnel to fix and construct. Equiped with excavation tools and machine arms, whole armor is made of hard gold, providing great resistance to blunt damage and intense heat. Its leg's mechenical structure were modified to bearing weight, but in the cost of movement speed. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HGiantSpirit.label: Giant Spirit Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HGiantSpirit.description: Heavy power armor helmet of the FlameLegion. Under its astonishing weight is its extraordinary prodection. Please keep in mind that wearing the power armor first, there are already mutiple case of broken neck due to overweight because they put on the helmet first. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_GiantSpirit.label: Giant Spirit Armor
LanguageData.XEA_GiantSpirit.description: Heavy power armor of the FlameLegion. Its extra armorplate can provide great amount of protection, but quite heavy, result in the engine strugling to survive. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HGiantSpiritM.label: Giant Spirit Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HGiantSpiritM.description: Heavy power armor helmet of the FlameLegion. Under its astonishing weight is its extraordinary prodection. Please keep in mind that wearing the power armor first, there are already mutiple case of broken neck due to overweight because they put on the helmet first. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_GiantSpiritM.label: Giant Spirit Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_GiantSpiritM.description: Heavy power armor of the FlameLegion. Its extra armorplate can provide great amount of protection, but quite heavy, result in the engine strugling to survive. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HOverlord.label: Overlord Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HOverlord.description: Equipment of the FlameLegion commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Overlord.label: Overlord Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Overlord.description: Equipment of the FlameLegion commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HOverlordM.label: Overlord Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HOverlordM.description: Equipment of the FlameLegion commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_OverlordM.label: Overlord Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_OverlordM.description: Equipment of the FlameLegion commander. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Chef.label: FFF Chef Suit
LanguageData.XEA_Chef.description: FlameLegion is always very serious about food, and their chef took this attitude to sickness. Their muti-culture background result in that there are hundreds of way to cook a humand. If you wear this suit than you can feel its POWER!
LanguageData.XEA_HKnight.label: Knight Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HKnight.description: A helmet made of MPsteel, having both toughness and penetrate resistant. The berserker sytem can control its wearer's secretory system reducing pain. But there are many user suffering mutiple compound fracture in their limbs.
LanguageData.XEA_Knight.label: Knight Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Knight.description: This armor is one of the best of the DimondBone. It's compound joint provide its wearer stronger strenght and speed. Made of MPsteel, it has both toughness and penetrat resistance but be careful, it is prone to thermal energy. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HKnightM.label: Knight Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HKnightM.description: A helmet made of MPsteel, having both toughness and penetrate resistant. The berserker sytem can control its wearer's secretory system reducing pain. But there are many user suffering mutiple compound fracture in their limbs.
LanguageData.XEA_KnightM.label: Knight Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_KnightM.description: This armor is one of the best of the DimondBone. It's compound joint provide its wearer stronger strenght and speed. Made of MPsteel, it has both toughness and penetrat resistance but be careful, it is prone to thermal energy. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HDarkKnight.label: Dark Knight Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HDarkKnight.description: Equipment for the Dark Knight of the DimondBone.
LanguageData.XEA_DarkKnight.label: Dark Knight Armor
LanguageData.XEA_DarkKnight.description: Equipment for the Dark Knight of the DimondBone. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HDarkKnightM.label: Dark Knight Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HDarkKnightM.description: Equipment for the Dark Knight of the DimondBone.
LanguageData.XEA_DarkKnightM.label: Dark Knight Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_DarkKnightM.description: Equipment for the Dark Knight of the DimondBone. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HPlatinum.label: Platinum Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HPlatinum.description: Made of Platinum, it has great defence against both blunt and penetration. The built in invasive neural accelerator enable the wearer to lock on target in abnormal speed, but in the cost of accuracy due to the over-reaction to the muscles casued by the acceleration. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Platinum.label: Platinum Armor
LanguageData.XEA_Platinum.description: Made of platinum, it has great defence against both blunt and penetration, the weight is also lighter compare to other power armor. Due to the fact that this kind of metal is also prone to thermal energy, therefore, it takes a hollow design to reduce thermal conductivity, which increase it volume and cause it to be less agile. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HPlatinumM.label: Platinum Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HPlatinumM.description: Made of Platinum, it has great defence against both blunt and penetration. The built in invasive neural accelerator enable the wearer to lock on target in abnormal speed, but in the cost of accuracy due to the over-reaction to the muscles casued by the acceleration. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_PlatinumM.label: Platinum Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_PlatinumM.description: Made of platinum, it has great defence against both blunt and penetration, the weight is also lighter compare to other power armor. Due to the fact that this kind of metal is also prone to thermal energy, therefore, it takes a hollow design to reduce thermal conductivity, which increase it volume and cause it to be less agile. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Medical.label: DB Doctor Suit
LanguageData.XEA_Medical.description: Reaserchers of DimondBone are addictive to bio-techonology. After conducting numerous of inhuman experment, their knowledge in human body and medicine are deeper than those in the middle rimworld. Wearing it you can also feel its POWER!
LanguageData.XEA_HBlackSea.label: Black Sea Walker Helmet
LanguageData.XEA_HBlackSea.description: This armor was originally reserved for Pirate Lord's stroops. The Pirate Lord like to call the univers as black sea, and this gives the armor its name. Made of blacksteel, it can adapt to variour situation. Though old, it is still popular amoung the pirate of its great performance and its story. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_BlackSea.label: Black Sea Walker Armor
LanguageData.XEA_BlackSea.description: This armor was originally reserved for Pirate Lord's stroops. The Pirate Lord like to call the univers as black sea, and this gives the armor its name. Made of blacksteel, it can adapt to variour situation. Though old, it is still popular amoung the pirate of its great performance and its story. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_HBlackSeaM.label: Black Sea Walker Helmet MIL
LanguageData.XEA_HBlackSeaM.description: This armor was originally reserved for Pirate Lord's stroops. The Pirate Lord like to call the univers as black sea, and this gives the armor its name. Made of blacksteel, it can adapt to variour situation. Though old, it is still popular amoung the pirate of its great performance and its story. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_BlackSeaM.label: Black Sea Walker Armor MIL
LanguageData.XEA_BlackSeaM.description: This armor was originally reserved for Pirate Lord's stroops. The Pirate Lord like to call the univers as black sea, and this gives the armor its name. Made of blacksteel, it can adapt to variour situation. Though old, it is still popular amoung the pirate of its great performance and its story. Can be used in the Save Our Ship 2 universe.
LanguageData.XEA_Gown.label: Noble Gown
LanguageData.XEA_Gown.description: The nobles are often good social animals and born with good tatlent. Put on this gown and feels their charm.
LanguageData.XEA_Shorts.label: Shorts
LanguageData.XEA_Shorts.description: Underwear was originally used to hide the private parts of the body, and with the development of culture, their function have also changed.
LanguageData.XEA_Underwear.label: Female Underwear
LanguageData.XEA_Underwear.description: Underwear was originally used to hide the private parts of the body, and with the development of culture, their function have also changed.
LanguageData.XEA_Tights.label: Nano Tights
LanguageData.XEA_Tights.description: A invasive tights. The nanobots in the suit will repair body tissue and accelerate the metabolism of the wearer and makes them sexy.
LanguageData.XEA_HWedding.label: Wedding Veil
LanguageData.XEA_HWedding.description: "If there is a day which woman is the fairest, this is the day!" Oringinal the wedding veil of the StarExplorers, its glorious carved into others memories and soon accepted by other factions' people and become a shared culture.
LanguageData.XEA_Wedding.label: Wedding Dress
LanguageData.XEA_Wedding.description: "If there is a day which woman is the fairest, this is the day!" Oringinal the wedding veil of the StarExplorers, its glorious carved into others memories and soon accepted by other factions' people and become a shared culture.
LanguageData.XEA_WeddingM.label: Tuxedo
LanguageData.XEA_WeddingM.description: "If there is a day which man is the toughest, this is the day!" Oringinal the wedding suit of the StarExplorer, its glorious carved into others memories and soon accepted by other factions' people and become a shared culture.
